title: Verify GitHub Actions CI workflow runs correctly
description: .github/workflows/test.yml was just created but never pushed or verified. Need to confirm it runs on GitHub, installs deps correctly, and reports test results on PRs.
requirements: Push the workflow file to a branch
Create a test PR to trigger the workflow
Verify pytest runs and reports results
Fix any dependency issues in the CI environment
done_criteria: GitHub Actions shows a successful test run
PR status check shows pass/fail correctly
context: First-ever CI for this repo. May need to adjust requirements.txt for Ubuntu (e.g., fastembed model download).
